title: salix × hugueninii
intro: Salix × hugueninii, a hybrid willow tree, is a cross between the Salix alba and Salix fragilis species, known for its slender branches and ornamental value. The bark and leaves of Salix × hugueninii are used in traditional medicine due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat conditions such as arthritis, gout, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of Salix × hugueninii can be made into a decoction or infused in hot water to create a soothing tea.
